open_questions: unit_03381: Projectile-weapons chunk is garbled (repeated effect names without table structure); cannot recover rank/cost rows from text alone.
unit_03441: Shields/armor lines mix stat bonuses with unrelated equipment names; unclear which numbers map to which traits.
unit_03561: SPACE VEHICLES chunk is numeric fragment only (12 14 14 16) with no labels.
unit_03680: PERSONNEL feature text is truncated mid-sentence; staffing rules incomplete.
unit_03696: SECRET feature excerpt starts mid-rule; rebuild timing/conditions not fully stated.
unit_03875, unit_03887: Single-number or numeric noise chunks; no interpretable rule.
unit_03976: ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARDS opens a topic but cuts off before hazard mechanics.
unit_04074: Narrative play-example opener only; no additional mechanical spine beyond flavor.
unit_04128_merged: MINIONS text is corrupted (bullet gaps, Parry/Dodge sentence spliced in); routine-check and worst-degree rules need a clean K-read.
unit_04248: FINISHING ATTACK cuts off before full routine-check rule is stated.
Equipment/vehicles/HQ features (many chunks): rich setting content; mapping to the six spine modules often indirect (effect ranks, DCs, checks) and may need Equipment chapter pairing.
cross_cutting_notes: Batch 3 mixes gear, vehicles, headquarters, constructs, and conflict chapters. Effect ranks and Affliction/Fortitude DCs tie equipment examples to Powers and ResistanceCheck; attack and defense class tie Abilities to Checks; suffocation, falling, poisons, and hazards link Rank/Measurement intuitions to Fortitude/Toughness loops; minions and Impervous examples alter default attack and resistance resolution. Many chunks are tables, lists, or PDF fragments—concepts stay hypothesis/scaffolded pending cleaner source reads.

concept.name: CombatRoundDurationEstimate
concept.owns: Owns that one action round represents about six seconds of in-world time when turn order and per-turn limits matter.

concept.name: FallDamageRankFromDistanceRank
concept.owns: Owns fall damage as base rank 4 plus twice the distance rank fallen, capped at rank 16, before other surface or catcher adjustments.

concept.name: EnvironmentalHazardIntensityExamples
concept.owns: Owns example ranked intensities for radiation sources and fire/heats (torch through chemical accelerants) as a hazard reference scale fragment.

concept.name: VehicleSizeCategoryPointCost
concept.owns: Owns that vehicles default to medium size and each step up in size category costs one power point, adjusting base Strength, Toughness, and Defense (exact deltas truncated in chunk).

concept.name: ConstructAdvantageAbilityGate
concept.owns: Owns that constructs cannot take advantages that require abilities the construct does not have (parallel to skill restrictions).

concept.name: StaminaBreathHoldRoundBudget
concept.owns: Owns holding breath for ten rounds plus rounds equal to twice Stamina rank before suffocation Fortitude checks begin.

concept.name: AttackCheckVersusDefenseClass
concept.owns: Owns attack resolution as d20 plus attack bonus meeting or beating the target defense class to hit.

concept.name: RoutineAttackCheckAgainstMinion
concept.owns: Owns that non-minions may treat attack checks against minions as routine checks (minion combat chunk partially corrupted).

concept.name: TechnologyRestrictedCommunicationsDC
concept.owns: Owns DC 25 on a Technology skill check to gain illegal access to restricted communication systems when the GM allows.

concept.name: CatchFallingTargetDexterityDC
concept.owns: Owns DC 5 Dexterity check to catch a falling person or object, then subtract catcher Strength (or GM-approved power rank) from fall damage rank for split remainder damage.

concept.name: AllOutAttackDefenseForAttackTrade
concept.owns: Owns voluntarily taking up to -2 on Dodge and Parry until start of next turn to add up to +2 attack bonus, with defenses not below +0 and attack not more than doubled.

concept.name: StandardAndMoveActionPerCombatRound
concept.owns: Owns that during a combat round a character can take one standard action and one move action on their turn (in addition to free/reaction rules elsewhere).

concept.name: ReactionVersusFreeActionTiming
concept.owns: Owns that reactions are like free actions in speed but can occur off-turn in response to events, unlike conscious free actions on your turn.

concept.name: TechnologySkillHQCommunicationsUse
concept.owns: Owns Technology skill as the gate for illegal access to restricted bands on headquarters communications gear, given user clearance and GM permission.

concept.name: AcrobaticsMitigateFallDistance
concept.owns: Owns Acrobatics skill allowing falls from greater distances without damage (exact thresholds not in this chunk).

concept.name: TechnologyRepairDamagedObjects
concept.owns: Owns using the Technology skill guidelines to repair damaged objects that lack Stamina-based natural recovery (per conflict recovery discussion).

concept.name: EquipmentAfflictionFortitudeDCExample
concept.owns: Owns taser as compressed-air darts imposing Affliction resisted by Fortitude at DC 15 (equipment-stated effect parameters).

concept.name: ConstructArchetypePowerExamples
concept.owns: Owns sample construct power packages (e.g. undead Fortitude Immunity; armor Protection; robot Fortitude Immunity; giant Growth) as minion-scale references.

concept.name: AlternateVehicleEquipmentPointPricing
concept.owns: Owns paying full equipment cost for the most expensive vehicle and one equipment point per additional vehicle of same or lesser cost (Alternate Equipment pattern for vehicles).

concept.name: HeadquartersDefenseSystemEffectCap
concept.owns: Owns HQ defense emplacements using attack effects costing no more than twice headquarters power level, with attack bonus equal to that power level.

concept.name: TurnStartEndsUntilNextTurnEffects
concept.owns: Owns ending effects that last until the start of your next turn when that turn begins (partial turn-start checklist).

concept.name: ToughnessResistanceAfterDamageHit
concept.owns: Owns that a successful hit with Damage forces a Toughness resistance check.

concept.name: SuffocationFortitudeEscalation
concept.owns: Owns repeating Fortitude checks (DC 10 +1 per prior success) each round after breath limit; failure leads to incapacitated then dying unless breathing restored; Immunity to Suffocation bypasses.

concept.name: ConditionsFromResistanceFailure
concept.owns: Owns that failed resistance checks against attacks impose conditions by effect type and failure degree, referencing effect text and Conditions in Basics.

concept.name: AreaAndPerceptionAutomaticEffectResolution
concept.owns: Owns that Perception and Area attacks skip attack checks, cannot crit or miss, and ignore attack-check modifiers including maneuvers.

concept.name: ImperviousSkipsUnneededAttackRoll
concept.owns: Owns skipping attack rolls when incoming damage cannot overcome Impervious Toughness threshold (play-example: guns vs Impervious 8).

concept.name: MinionCombatResolutionPackage
concept.owns: Owns bundled minion combat exceptions: no critical hits vs non-minions; failed resistance suffers worst effect degree; routine attacks allowed for non-minions (chunk partially corrupted).

concept.name: DamageConditionMinuteRecovery
concept.owns: Owns living targets removing one damage condition per minute of rest from most severe downward; Healing/Regeneration accelerates; objects without Stamina need repair instead.

concept.name: HeroDeathVersusMinionLethality
concept.owns: Owns rare, staged PC death path versus simpler minion elimination on successful attack plus intent; slam damage immunity ranks referenced.

concept.name: OptionalInitiativeForTimedChallenge
concept.owns: Owns GM discretion to skip initiative when order is irrelevant, or roll initiative when timing matters (e.g. collapse after first round, hazards with initiative).
